updateHistory.reason: Add Line 5 adjustment section. Also adding languages and descriptions.
Add newly opened line sections and update map layout

The following content has been added in this update: 1.Virtual interchange stations have been newly added. The virtual interchange function has been enabled between Ziyanghu Station and Fuxing Road Station, between East Square of Wuchang Railway Station and Wuchang Railway Station, as well as among East Square of Wuhan Railway Station, West Square of Wuhan Railway Station and Wuhan Railway Station (all the above-mentioned virtual interchange stations are specified in official documents). 2.A Legend has been newly added. The Legend displays all the information of this route map, including route identifiers and station styles. 3.A Viewing Note has been newly added, indicating that this route map is for reference only.
This is a metro routemap of Wuhan
